title: Day Count
description: A mod that displays the day count in the top left.
body:
### **Note:**
### Starting with Minecraft 26.1 the Fabric version is part of this [Day Counter](https://modrinth.com/mod/daycount) (with a unified codebase)

\----------------------------------

A minecraft mod that displays the current day in the top left. It also has settings that you can customize such as size, location and color.

**Please note:** starting with version 1.3.0 this mod uses the Cloth Config API + Mod Menu for configuration. The GUI config screen was removed.

![DayCount](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1a1b467a004f6954c08eb865ac3f52aa6d38dd3_0.webp)
